ITEM.name: Torn Page 13
ITEM.desc: A page torn out of a book. The faint print says page 13.

ITEM.name: Torn Page 25
ITEM.desc: A page torn out of a book. The faint print says page 25.

ITEM.name: Torn Page 41
ITEM.desc: A page torn out of a book. The faint print says page 41.

ITEM.name: Torn Page 65
ITEM.desc: A page torn out of a book. The faint print says page 65.

ITEM.name: Small Skull
ITEM.desc: Mysterious Skull. It looks like it is a skull of a bird.

ITEM.name: Large Skull
ITEM.desc: Mysterious Skull. Not identified, the owner of the skull seems to have had a big head.

ITEM.name: Mysterious Skull
ITEM.desc: Mysterious skull whose usage not identified.

ITEM.name: Goblin's Skull
ITEM.desc: Skull of Goblin. An inscription on one side says, 'Call for a new world.'

ITEM.name: King Goblin's Skull
ITEM.desc: Skull of the King, Goblin.

ITEM.name: Enormously huge bone
ITEM.desc: It looks like bones of a man. However, the size is equivalent to that of a dinosaur.

ITEM.name: Raw Meat
ITEM.desc: Raw meat of unknown animal. It seemed to have been used as food.

ITEM.name: Seasoned Meat (Bulgogi)
ITEM.desc: Cooked seasoned meat. Looks very delicious.

ITEM.name: Steak
ITEM.desc: Very delicious looking steak. It must have been Monster's favorite.

ITEM.name: Iron Earring
ITEM.desc: Iron-made earrings for the tribe, Kobold. Humans cannot wear them.

ITEM.name: Silver Earring
ITEM.desc: Silver earrings for the tribe, Kobold. Humans cannot wear them.

ITEM.name: Gold Earring
ITEM.desc: Gold earrings for the tribe, Kobold. Humans cannot wear them.

ITEM.name: Platinum Earring
ITEM.desc: Earrings made of special metal used by the King, Kobold. Humans cannot wear them.

ITEM.name: Crimson's Necklace
ITEM.desc: A necklace worn by the trial chief of Goblin. It is highly doubtful whether humans can wear it.

ITEM.name: Skeleton Doll
ITEM.desc: Doll made in the shape of the skeleton of a soldier. The taste of the maker is highly doubtful.

ITEM.name: Kobold Doll
ITEM.desc: This doll looks exactly like Kobold! Will children be happy to get this doll?

ITEM.name: Goblin Doll
ITEM.desc: Just looks like Goblin! But it seems that it could be used for nothing.

ITEM.name: Pampow Doll
ITEM.desc: Doll that just looks like the mischievous fairy, Pampow.

ITEM.name: Rabbit Doll
ITEM.desc: Cute doll shaped like rabbit. What is it for then?!

ITEM.name: Stuffed Bear
ITEM.desc: Stuffed animal that kids used to have on their bed. How come it is in this...?!

ITEM.name: Cursed Bear
ITEM.desc: Kids may not want to have it on their bed. How come it is here... ?!

ITEM.name: Pampow Idol
ITEM.desc: Fairy shown in dreams. It just looks like Pampow.

ITEM.name: Cursed Pampow Idol
ITEM.desc: It just looks like Pampow. However, it looks dreary somehow.

ITEM.name: Devil's Dictionary
ITEM.desc: Dictionary that is full of strange contents.

ITEM.name: Scrider's Register Volume I
ITEM.desc: A strange book full of people's names, volume I. It is said to have come from hell.

ITEM.name: Scrider's Register Volume II
ITEM.desc: A strange book full of people's names, volume II. It is said to have come from hell.

ITEM.name: Blessed Cross
ITEM.desc: It is similar to one that the gun priests had.

ITEM.name: Cursed Cross
ITEM.desc: It is similar to one that the gun priests had. But...

ITEM.name: Pickax
ITEM.desc: This is a pickax that is used in a stope. But where to mine with it?

ITEM.name: Speaking Stone
ITEM.desc: This stone utters weird things from time to time. It can move, too.

ITEM.name: Ice Crystal
ITEM.desc: Ice crystal that seems not to be melted by usual heat.

ITEM.name: Broken Gear
ITEM.desc: Gear that has been broken. It seems no one can use it again.

ITEM.name: High-class Gear
ITEM.desc: Gear that seems to have had some important function in a machine.

ITEM.name: Ax of Goblin King
ITEM.desc: Scary ax that is used by the King, Goblin King. It is regretful that humans cannot use it.

ITEM.name: Goblin's Picture Book
ITEM.desc: A picture book containing the information about Goblin.
